data.source: OpenChargeMap API daily charger count snapshots for top 10 US metros

behavior: Rapid growth in public EV charger installation signals infrastructure spending acceleration and rising EV adoption confidence, which precedes automotive and energy sector rotation.

market_impact.rationale: EV charging infrastructure expansion correlates with energy transition capex cycles and utility modernization demand.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly net charger additions across monitored metros exceed 200 units and are 40% above 12-week rolling average
trade_logic.exit: After 10 trading days or if weekly charger additions drop below 12-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Infrastructure deployment cycles are continuous; charger installation surges frequently occur during policy incentive windows and private capex pushes.

idea: Google Trends Surge in 'Supply Chain Rerouting' Keywords

data.source: Google Trends weekly search volume for 'nearshoring', 'supply chain resilience', 'logistics optimization'

behavior: Spikes in supply chain rerouting searches indicate corporate logistics strategy shifts and manufacturing relocation activity, preceding industrial and materials sector moves.

market_impact.rationale: Supply chain optimization spending and reshoring capex drive industrial equipment and manufacturing services demand.

trade_logic.entry: If 3-week average of combined search volume exceeds 65th percentile of prior 52-week distribution
trade_logic.exit: After 14 trading days or if search volume falls below 50th percentile for 2 consecutive weeks

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Supply chain discussions are persistent; search volume surges occur regularly with quarterly earnings seasons and geopolitical events.

data.source: Open-Meteo daily temperature data for US heating degree days across 5 regional hubs

behavior: Unexpected cold snaps drive heating fuel demand and natural gas consumption, creating short-term energy sector outperformance and utility cash flow tailwinds.

market_impact.rationale: Demand spikes for heating directly increase utility revenues and natural gas futures, supporting utility sector valuations.

trade_logic.entry: If heating degree days exceed 65th percentile of trailing 30-day average and weekly volume on XLU rises 30% above baseline
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or if temperatures normalize and heating degree days fall below 45th percentile

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal temperature volatility is guaranteed; heating demand spikes occur multiple times per winter and shoulder seasons.

idea: FDA Drug Approval Pipeline Density Burst

data.source: RSS feed aggregation from FDA press releases and biotech news wires, daily count of approval announcements

behavior: Clusters of FDA approvals signal acceleration in pharma innovation cycles and often precede healthcare equity rallies and biotech rotation rotations.

market_impact.rationale: Drug approvals reduce pipeline risk for pharma companies and drive revenue growth expectations and sector sentiment rotation.

trade_logic.entry: If 5-day rolling count of FDA approval announcements exceeds 4 and is 50% above 60-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 12 trading days or if approval count falls to baseline for 3 consecutive days

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: FDA maintains a regular approval calendar; approval clusters naturally occur throughout the year with predictable cycles.

data.source: FRED series ICSA (initial jobless claims) weekly data

behavior: Week-over-week drops in jobless claims of 8%+ often signal labor market stabilization and consumer confidence inflection, driving consumer discretionary and financials outperformance.

market_impact.rationale: Declining jobless claims reduce economic recession risk and support consumer spending and credit confidence.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly jobless claims drop 8% or more week-over-week AND claims fall below 4-week moving average
trade_logic.exit: After 8 trading days or if claims spike above prior week's level

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly jobless claims data is released every Thursday; momentum reversals occur frequently in normal labor market cycles.

idea: Commercial Real Estate Distress News Spike

data.source: RSS feed count from commercial real estate news sources and bankruptcy court filings mentioning office/retail defaults

behavior: Clusters of CRE distress stories signal property value compression and lender stress, creating mean reversion shorts in XLRE and bullish trades in restructuring-adjacent sectors.

market_impact.rationale: Rising CRE defaults and distress filings directly impair REIT asset values and dividend sustainability.

trade_logic.entry: If 3-day rolling count of CRE distress news articles exceeds 6 and is 60% above 30-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 10 trading days or if CRE distress news count falls to baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: CRE stress cycles are persistent; distress news clusters occur regularly as office leasing cycles and loan maturity cohorts create recurring pressure windows.

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily copper futures (HG) prices and implied volatility

behavior: Spikes in copper volatility above 40th percentile combined with price strength signal industrial demand uncertainty and infrastructure cycle inflection, driving cyclical materials rotation.

market_impact.rationale: Copper volatility expansion reflects uncertainty in industrial demand; resolution often drives materials and mining equity rallies.

trade_logic.entry: If 10-day realized volatility of copper futures exceeds 20% AND copper closes above 20-day MA on above-average volume
trade_logic.exit: After 9 trading days or if copper volatility collapses below 15%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Commodity volatility cycles are continuous; copper volatility surges frequently with geopolitical events and demand data releases.

data.source: Google Trends weekly search volume for 'nursing shortage', 'healthcare staffing crisis', 'hospital hiring'

behavior: Spikes in healthcare labor shortage searches indicate wage pressure and operational stress in hospitals, signaling margin compression and staffing cost inflation in healthcare providers.

market_impact.rationale: Healthcare labor shortages increase wage costs and operational inefficiency, compressing provider margins and driving negative earnings revisions.

trade_logic.entry: If 3-week average search volume exceeds 70th percentile of prior 52-week distribution
trade_logic.exit: After 14 trading days or if search volume falls below 50th percentile for 2 consecutive weeks

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Healthcare labor discussions are seasonal and persistent; search volume surges occur regularly with winter illness cycles and seasonal hiring windows.

data.source: RSS feed count from financial crime and regulatory news sources, daily article count mentioning fraud cases and SEC enforcement

behavior: Elevated fraud news clusters indicate regulatory scrutiny cycles and compliance cost inflation for financial services, driving sector rotation and risk repricing.

market_impact.rationale: Fraud clusters trigger regulatory crackdowns and compliance cost spikes, pressuring financial services profitability and valuation multiples.

trade_logic.entry: If 5-day rolling count of fraud/enforcement news exceeds 8 and is 55% above 60-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 11 trading days or if fraud news count drops below 60-day average for 3 consecutive days

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Regulatory and fraud news is continuous; enforcement action clusters naturally occur throughout the year as regulators work through investigation pipelines.

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily natural gas futures (NG) prices and 20-day historical volatility

behavior: When natural gas volatility drops below 30th percentile and price stabilizes above 50-day MA, it signals completion of selloff and impending recovery momentum, supporting energy sector rotations.

market_impact.rationale: Low volatility combined with price support often precedes natural gas recovery rallies and improved energy company cash flows.

trade_logic.entry: If 20-day realized volatility of NG futures falls below 25% AND NG closes above 50-day MA on 3 of last 4 trading days
trade_logic.exit: After 10 trading days or if NG volatility spikes above 40%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Commodity volatility cycles are predictable; natural gas volatility compression periods occur regularly with seasonal demand patterns and inventory management cycles.
